info.title: DataLabel Project API
info.description: Backend API cho hệ thống Data Labeling

get.summary:
GET api/tasks/items/{itemId}/annotations
Get annotations by task item

GET api/tasks/{taskId}/annotations
Get annotations of a task

200.description: Login successful, returns user info and JWT token

401.description: Invalid credentials or account is inactive

400.description: Invalid data or incorrect old password

post.summary: Refresh access token using refresh token
Logout user by revoking refresh token

Create a new dataset. File upload is optional.
Accepts image files or archive files (zip/rar) containing only image files.

get.summary: Get dataset by ID with item count and metadata.

put.summary: Update an existing dataset. Can update name and description.

delete.summary: Delete a dataset and all its associated data.

get.summary: Get all dataset items for a specific dataset.

post.summary:
Upload a file or archive into an existing dataset.
Accepts single image/audio/text or archive (zip/rar) containing allowed files.
Uploads rely on strategy detection; dataset mediaType field no longer exists.

delete.summary: Delete a dataset item by ID.

post.summary:
Attach a dataset to a project.
Only the creator of both the dataset and project can perform this operation.

Detach a dataset to a project.
Only the creator of both the dataset and project can perform this operation.

get.summary: Get all active members of a project
Get all task items for a project

post.summary: Create a new project template (admin only)

get.summary: Get items of a task (filter by status/isExpired)

post.summary: Assign dataset to a user (manager only)
Assign task items to a task (manager only)
